subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from Our presence unto him who hath believed in God, that it may sever him from all else save Him and draw him nigh unto his Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدنا الی الذی آمن بالله لینقطعه عما سواه و یقربه الی مولاه
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @chastisement and requital, @call to action, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
